note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves the manufacturing of silicone stoppers for balloon tags used in fish recovery and sensor deployment. The goal is to develop a protocol that enhances the efficiency and reliability of these tags.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A person wearing gloves measures and cuts a piece of silicone material using a cutting tool.",
    "The cut piece is then placed into a mold to form a stopper.",
    "The stopper is further processed by heating it in an oven.",
    "Finally, the stopper is inspected and tested for functionality."
  ],

    "Mold",
    "O-ring",
    "Heating oven"
  ],

    "Mold",
    "Heating oven"
  ],

    "Volume of balloons (cm³)",
    "Average inflation time (seconds)"
  ],

    "Placing the cut material in the mold",
    "Heating the mold in the oven",
    "Inspecting the finished stopper"
  ],

    "Balloon tag assembly improved",
